hero.tagline: A Simple & Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine
hero.desc: Even from a single paragraph, {highlight} can extract real-world seeds to automatically generate a parallel world with up to {agents} agents. Inject variables from a god's-eye view to find the {optimum} in complex group interactions under dynamic environments.
hero.slogan: Rehearse the future in agent swarms, win decisions after a hundred battles

status.readyDesc: Prediction engine on standby. Upload unstructured data to initialize simulation sequence.

workflow.title: Workflow Sequence
workflow.step1Desc: Seed extraction & Individual/collective memory injection & GraphRAG construction
workflow.step2Desc: Entity relationship extraction & Persona generation & Agent config injection
workflow.step3Desc: Dual-platform parallel simulation & Auto-parse requirements & Dynamic temporal memory
workflow.step4Desc: ReportAgent with rich toolset for deep post-simulation interaction
workflow.step5Desc: Chat with any agent in the simulated world & Interact with ReportAgent

upload.placeholder: // Describe your simulation or prediction needs in natural language (e.g., What public opinion trends would emerge if University X revokes a disciplinary decision?)

history.title: Simulation Records
history.replayHint: Step 3 "Start Simulation" and Step 5 "Deep Interaction" can only be launched during runtime and do not support historical replay

graph.buildCompleteDesc: Graph construction complete. Proceed to environment setup.
graph.memoryUpdating: GraphRAG long/short-term memory updating in real time
graph.pendingRefresh: Some content is still processing. We recommend refreshing the graph manually later.
graph.autoStartBuild: Graph construction will start automatically after completion

process.ontologyDesc: After uploading documents, the LLM analyzes the content and generates an ontology structure suitable for simulation (entity types + relation types)
process.graphBuildDesc: Based on the generated ontology, documents are chunked and sent to Zep API to build a knowledge graph, extracting entities and relations
process.noFilesError: No files to upload. Please return to home and try again.

env.simInitDesc: Create a new simulation instance and pull world parameter templates
env.agentProfileDesc: Combining context, automatically extract entities and relations from the knowledge graph, initialize simulation individuals, and assign unique behaviors and memories based on reality seeds
env.dualPlatformDesc: LLM intelligently sets world time flow, recommendation algorithms, individual active periods, posting frequency, event triggers, and other parameters based on simulation needs and reality seeds
env.activationDesc: Based on the narrative direction, automatically generate initial activation events and trending topics to guide the initial state of the simulated world
env.readyCompleteDesc: Simulation environment is ready. You can start the simulation.
env.roundsConfigDesc: MiroFish auto-plans simulation of {hours} real hours, each round represents {minutes} real minutes of time elapsed
env.customTip: If running for the first time, we strongly recommend switching to 'Custom mode' to reduce simulation rounds for a quick preview and lower error risk
env.personaDimDesc1: Complete behavioral trajectory within this event
env.personaDimDesc3: Memories formed based on reality seeds

interact.agentChat: Chat with any individual in the world
interact.reportAgentDesc: Fast chat version of the report generation agent, with 4 professional tools and full MiroFish memory
interact.insightForgeDesc: Aligns real-world seed data with simulation environment state, using Global/Local Memory for cross-temporal deep attribution analysis
interact.panoramaSearchDesc: Graph-based breadth traversal algorithm that reconstructs event propagation paths, capturing the topological structure of information flow
interact.quickSearchDesc: Instant query interface based on GraphRAG, optimized indexing for quick extraction of node attributes and discrete facts
interact.interviewAgentDesc: Autonomous interviews that can conduct parallel multi-round dialogues with individuals in the simulated world, collecting unstructured opinion data and psychological states
interact.chatEmptyReport: Chat with Report Agent to dive deeper into the report content
interact.chatEmptyAgent: Chat with a simulated individual to understand their perspective
interact.surveyPlaceholder: Enter the question you want to ask all selected agents...

logs.simEnvRunning: Simulation environment detected running, shutting down...
logs.timeConfigFailed: Failed to get time config, using default: {minutes} min/round
logs.prepBackStep2: Preparing to return to Step 2, shutting down simulation...
